columns.name: animalNumber
columns.description: The unique identification number assigned to the cow.

columns.name: milkingDate
columns.description: The calendar date of the milking session.

columns.name: milkingTime
columns.description: The timestamp of the milking session.

columns.name: currentYield
columns.description: The amount of milk produced (in centiliters or grams).

columns.name: frameNumber
columns.description: Identifier for the milking stall frame.

columns.name: systemCode
columns.description: Random Internal system code associated with the animal.

status_code_explanations.!: Incomplete or interrupted milking session (endOfMilkingStatus = 1 or 2).
status_code_explanations.#: Failed connection or zero-yield session (endOfMilkingStatus = 4 or other).
